allow: Bash(else echo "Overlay helper: not bundled \(expected if not compiled\)")

Bash(# Unload any launchd services first launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.dictation.app.plist launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.dictation.transcription.plist launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.dictation.llm.plist # Force kill everything kill -9 3544 88904 1677 # Clean up sockets and PID files rm -f /tmp/dictation_*.sock ~/.dictation_*.pid sleep 1 ps aux)
Bash(# These are zombie/uninterruptible py2app probe processes - force kill kill -9 88904 1677 sleep 1 ps aux)
Bash(# Find which specific file has the problematic resource fork find dist/Dictation.app -exec xattr -l {} \\;)

Bash(# The issue is likely on directories too, not just files. Clear ALL xattrs on dirs and files find dist/Dictation.app -exec xattr -c {} + # Also check for actual resource forks \(._* files or /..namedfork/rsrc\) find dist/Dictation.app -name ''._*'' -print -delete # Verify nothing left xattr -rl dist/Dictation.app)
Bash(# Kill old processes pkill -f ""dictation_app_mac.py"" || true sleep 1 # Check if TextEcho process is still there ps aux)

Bash(# Kill everything related to the app pkill -9 -f ""TextEcho"" || true pkill -9 -f ""dictation_app"" || true pkill -9 -f ""transcription_daemon"" || true pkill -9 -f ""DictationOverlay"" || true sleep 2 # Verify nothing running echo ""Checking for remaining processes:"" ps aux)

Bash(# Clean up pkill -9 -f ""TextEcho"" || true pkill -9 -f ""dictation"" || true rm -rf /Applications/TextEcho.app rm -f ~/.dictation_config tccutil reset Accessibility com.braxcat.textecho || true tccutil reset Microphone com.braxcat.textecho || true # Rebuild source .venv/bin/activate && rm -rf build dist && python setup.py py2app 2>&1)

Bash(# Clear icon cache sudo rm -rf /Library/Caches/com.apple.iconservices.store || true killall Finder || true killall Dock || true # Touch the app to invalidate cache touch dist/TextEcho.app # Rebuild DMG rm -f dist/TextEcho.dmg hdiutil create -volname ""TextEcho"" -srcfolder dist/TextEcho.app -ov -format UDZO dist/TextEcho.dmg 2>&1)

Bash(# Clean up pkill -9 -f ""TextEcho"" || true pkill -9 -f ""dictation"" || true pkill -9 -f ""transcription_daemon"" || true rm -rf /Applications/TextEcho.app rm -f ~/.dictation_config # Rebuild source .venv/bin/activate && rm -rf build dist && python setup.py py2app 2>&1)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_ada44cf17ae8b320__ echo "DMG created with uninstall.sh included")
Bash(# Kill existing processes pkill -9 -f ""TextEcho"" || true pkill -9 -f ""transcription_daemon"" || true # Rebuild source .venv/bin/activate && rm -rf build dist && python setup.py py2app 2>&1)

Bash(# Copy mlx to bundle cp -R .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/mlx dist/TextEcho.app/Contents/Resources/lib/python3.12/ # Sign and create DMG xattr -cr dist/TextEcho.app codesign --force --deep --sign - dist/TextEcho.app # Create DMG rm -rf dist/dmg-staging mkdir -p dist/dmg-staging cp -R dist/TextEcho.app dist/dmg-staging/ ln -s /Applications dist/dmg-staging/Applications cp uninstall.sh dist/dmg-staging/ rm -f dist/TextEcho.dmg hdiutil create -volname ""TextEcho"" -srcfolder dist/dmg-staging -ov -format UDZO dist/TextEcho.dmg 2>&1)

Bash(# Kill any running daemon pkill -f ""transcription"" || true # Update dist with the fixes \(mlx package and libs\) cp -R .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/mlx dist/TextEcho.app/Contents/Resources/lib/python3.12/ mkdir -p dist/TextEcho.app/Contents/Resources/lib/python3.12/lib-dynload/mlx/lib cp .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/mlx/lib/* dist/TextEcho.app/Contents/Resources/lib/python3.12/lib-dynload/mlx/lib/ # Sign app xattr -cr dist/TextEcho.app codesign --force --deep --sign - dist/TextEcho.app # Create final DMG rm -rf dist/dmg-staging mkdir -p dist/dmg-staging cp -R dist/TextEcho.app dist/dmg-staging/ ln -s /Applications dist/dmg-staging/Applications cp uninstall.sh dist/dmg-staging/ rm -f dist/TextEcho.dmg hdiutil create -volname ""TextEcho"" -srcfolder dist/dmg-staging -ov -format UDZO dist/TextEcho.dmg 2>&1)
